name: sjs-desktop
description: Desktop app for Smart Job Seeker — runs Chrome locally for scraping with real residential IP

scripts.build: npm run sidecar:build && npm run ui:build && npm run tauri:build
scripts.sidecar:dev: npx esbuild src/main/sidecar.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=src-tauri/binaries/sjs-sidecar-$(rustc -vV | grep host | cut -d' ' -f2) --format=cjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && chmod +x src-tauri/binaries/sjs-sidecar-$(rustc -vV | grep host | cut -d' ' -f2)
scripts.sidecar:build: npm run sidecar:bundle && npx pkg dist/sidecar-bundle.cjs --target node20-$(node -e "console.log({darwin:'macos',win32:'win',linux:'linux'}[process.platform])") --output src-tauri/binaries/sjs-sidecar-$(rustc -vV | grep host | cut -d' ' -f2)
scripts.sidecar:build:linux-x64: npm run sidecar:bundle && npx pkg dist/sidecar-bundle.cjs --target node20-linux-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/sjs-sidecar-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.sidecar:build:mac-x64: npm run sidecar:bundle && npx pkg dist/sidecar-bundle.cjs --target node20-macos-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/sjs-sidecar-x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.sidecar:build:mac-arm64: npm run sidecar:bundle && npx pkg dist/sidecar-bundle.cjs --target node20-macos-arm64 --output src-tauri/binaries/sjs-sidecar-aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.sidecar:build:win-x64: npm run sidecar:bundle && npx pkg dist/sidecar-bundle.cjs --target node20-win-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/sjs-sidecar-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
